source.name: AccessAtlanta
source.title: The ultimate weekend checklist: 10 metro Atlanta events you absolutely need to check out

events.name: Taste of Alpharetta
events.description: This annual event turns downtown Alpharetta into a giant block party filled with incredible eats, live music and fun activities for the kids.

events.name: DreamHack Atlanta
events.description: This three-day event is bringing gaming expos, esports competitions, cosplay, creator meet-ups and interactive experiences to the Georgia World Congress Center.
events.location: Downtown Atlanta - 285 Andrew Young International Blvd. NW
events.time: 10 a.m. to 10 p.m. (Fri & Sat), 10 a.m. to 6 p.m. (Sun)

events.name: Marietta Greek Festival
events.description: Experience the sights, sounds and flavors of Greece at the Marietta Greek Festival, hosted at Holy Transfiguration Greek Orthodox Church. This cultural event features a weekend full of authentic Greek cuisine, live music and cultural exhibits.
events.time: 4-10:30 p.m (Fri), 11 a.m. to 10:30 p.m. (Sat), 11 a.m. to 4 p.m. (Sun)

events.name: Porchfest
events.description: Enjoy neighbors turning their porches into stages, a variety of food trucks and vendors selling all kinds of cool finds in the Virginia Highland District.

events.name: Kirkwood Spring Fling
events.description: This neighborhood favorite at Bessie Branham Park is the perfect way to spend a day with live music, a super chill artists market, local food trucks — and even a 5K if you’re feeling active.

events.name: Pop-In for Family Fun: Rockets & Robots
events.description: If you’re looking for a fun and educational way to spend the day with the kids, then this is for you. Marietta History Center is hosting its recurring Pop-in for Family Fun event, and this month’s theme is Rockets and Robots. Enjoy arts and crafts from 11 a.m. to 2 p.m. and free museum admission as well.

events.name: ImportExpo
events.description: Held at the Cobb Galleria Centre, this event showcases a diverse lineup of luxury cars and specialty vehicles, alongside vendors, live entertainment and more.

events.name: Lil’Palooza
events.description: Bring the kiddos to the Children’s Museum of Atlanta for an evening of music and fun activities. Tickets start at $10 and include a magic show, arts and crafts, dance parties and more.
events.location: Downtown Atlanta - 275 Centennial Olympic Park Drive NW

events.name: Atlanta Braves Block Party
events.description: Join the pregame celebration at The Battery Atlanta for an evening of themed activities, photo opportunities, fan experiences and so much more.

events.name: Market in the Park
events.description: Shop handmade goods, discover art and crafts, and enjoy food, music and family-friendly activities while supporting small businesses at Grant Park Conservancy.
